title: Progga

{{Quote|I know your sort. You do not simply run from something, but rather run to something else. This is the lone star system along this vector; and behold, you are here. What could you have run to but a secret base and treasure hoard?|translated=1|Progga, to Dubrak Qennto|<ref name="OF" />}}
'''Progga''', also known as '''Progga the Hutt''', was a minor [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] from the edge of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. He was active during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Progga [[Skirmish between Progga and the Bargain Hunter|ambushed]] the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Light freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Bargain Hunter]]'' in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] with his [[Progga's starship|ship]], hoping to steal the ''Bargain Hunter''{{'s}} cargo of rare [[Hair/Legends|furs]] and [[firegem]]s. Progga gave chase when the ''Bargain Hunter'' fled to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and followed the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] to a remote [[Unidentified Unknown Regions star system (skirmish between Progga and Picket Force Two)|star system]] in the Unknown Regions. However, when Progga finally trapped the ''Bargain Hunter'' in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|Expansionary Fleet]] [[Skirmish between Progga and Picket Force Two|attacked]] both parties. Progga's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] attempted to engage the new interlopers, but the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] forces proved too powerful, and Progga was [[Death/Legends|killed]] as his ship was destroyed .

==Biography==
===Pursuit of the Bargain Hunter===
{{Quote|Be sure to compliment Progga on his fairness and sound business sense. That always works on Hutts.|Dubrak Qennto, to [[Jorj Car'das]] and [[Maris Ferasi]] as they were pursued by Progga|<ref name="OF" />}}
[[File:Thrawn_Jorj.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Thrawn and Jorj Car'das, who were involved in the skirmish that killed Progga the Hutt]]
Originating from the fringes of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]],<ref name="Progga">{{CSWECite|III|52|Progga the Hutt}}</ref> Progga the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was a temperamental [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]<ref name="OF" /> and minor [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="Progga" /> who was active<ref name="OF" /> as of [[67 BBY/Legends|67 BBY]],<ref name="Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> during the waning [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="OF" /> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], kin of Progga and [[Drixo]] were seen by visitors of [[High Port Space Center]] on the [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] alongside envoys from [[Yaga (species)|Yagai]], [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]] and [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]]. Around the same [[Time/Legends|time]], both Hutts both befriended [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Hego Damask]] of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]], and they made successful but costly investments for themselves with the Muun on<ref name="Plagueis" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="OF" /> [[Comra/Legends|Comra]]—it resulted in Damask offering [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]] an investment in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] so she could fund a [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]].<ref name="Plagueis" />

During the years following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Progga formed a rivalry with Drixo.<ref name="Drixo">{{CSWECite|I|224|Drixo the Hutt}}</ref> In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="TERC" /> Progga<ref name="OF" /> and his crew,<ref name="Progga" /> aboard [[Progga's starship]], attempted to [[Skirmish between Progga and the Bargain Hunter|hijack]] the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Light freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Bargain Hunter]]'' in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Drixo hired the ''Bargain Hunter'', [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dubrak Qennto]], to transport a cargo of rare [[Hair/Legends|furs]] and [[firegem]]s to Comra.<ref name="OF" /> With Progga's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Laser/Legends|firing]] on the smuggling [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''Bargain Hunter'' made a short jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], hoping to flee Progga's ambush. However, the Hutt pirate pursued the ''Bargain Hunter'' and continued his assault once the freighter had exited hyperspace. Desperate to escape, the ''Bargain Hunter'' made another jump into hyperspace, and Progga again followed the smugglers. During the resulting four-[[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] jump, both starships left the Outer Rim Territories, passed through the region known as [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], and exited in the edges of the Unknown Regions.<ref name="OF" />

===Skirmish in the Unknown Regions===
{{Quote|So, Dubrak Qennto. You think to escape me so easily?|translated=1|Progga|<ref name="OF" />}}
After leaving hyperspace Progga tracked the ''Bargain Hunter'' to a nearby [[Unidentified Unknown Regions star system (skirmish between Progga and Picket Force Two)|star system]], where the freighter was trapped, its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] unresponsive. Because the [[Star system/Legends|system]] was the only one in the area, Progga came to the conclusion that Qennto had fled to this system because the smuggler had hidden a treasure hoard there, believing no one would find it. The Hutt hailed the ''Bargain Hunter'', demanding to know where Qennto had stashed his treasures; unbeknownst to Progga, the ''Bargain Hunter'', in its haste to escape, had made a random jump and had emerged in that particular system by happenstance.<ref name="OF" />

As Qennto tried to convince Progga that he did not have any base in the system, both ships were hit by large [[Conner net]]s, which released [[Electromagnetic pulse/Legends|electromagnetic pulses]] designed to disable the vessels. While the attack knocked the ''Bargain Hunter'' out of commission, Progga's starship was built to resist the Conner nets, and the Hutt's starship turned to [[Skirmish between Progga and Picket Force Two|confront]] the beings who had launched the nets—[[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]], composed of a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and three [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] escorts of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy's]] [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|Expansionary Fleet]].<ref name="OF" /> Progga ordered his crew to open fire on the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] cruiser,<ref name="Progga" /> the ''[[Springhawk/Legends|Springhawk]]'', and Chiss [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] "Thrawn" had his cruiser and two of his fighter escorts return fire. The Chiss numbers proved too overwhelming for the Hutt, and the pirate's starship was destroyed after six [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] of fighting, [[Death/Legends|killing]] Progga in the process.<ref name="OF" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Progga the Hutt is not the sort of person you want mad at you.|Jorj Car'das, a crew member of the ''Bargain Hunter''|<ref name="OF" />}}
Progga was quick to anger and often did not think before acting; when attacked by the Chiss forces, instead of realizing that he was outnumbered and outgunned, Progga immediately engaged the Chiss, resulting in his death. Progga incorrectly assumed that the only reason Qennto would head to the Unknown Regions was because he had a secret treasure hoard there; it did not occur to Progga that Qennto had stumbled upon the star system by accident. The Hutt spoke [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] but could understand [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as well.<ref name="OF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Progga was created by author [[Timothy Zahn]] for his novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], which was released in [[2006]].<ref name="OF" />

==Appearances==
